chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-864 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 3883/2022 06-12-2023 Applicant Mirza Katohar is present in person. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Applicant does not press listed application being not maintainable filed against the office and not against the persons and seeks permission to file a fresh application. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
